Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor

Class AbstractContextsSection<R extends IInternalElement,E extends IInternalElement>

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.forms.AbstractFormPart
org.eclipse.ui.forms.SectionPart
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.AbstractContextsSection<R,E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionChangedListener, org.eclipse.ui.forms.IFormPart, IElementChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtendsSection, SeesSection
public abstract class AbstractContextsSection<R extends IInternalElement,E extends IInternalElement> extends org.eclipse.ui.forms.SectionPart implements IElementChangedListener, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionChangedListener

  • Method Details

    • addClause

      protected abstract void addClause(String contextName) throws RodinDBException
      Add the clause for the context with the given name. This method will be run in a workspace runnable.
      Parameters:
      contextName - name of the context to add
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • addClauseInRunnable

      protected final void addClauseInRunnable(String contextName)

    • createClient

      public final void createClient(org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.Section section, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit)
      Creates the content of the section.

      Parameters:
      section - the parent section
      toolkit - the FormToolkit used to create the content

    • deleteElements

      final void deleteElements(org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IStructuredSelection ssel, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor pm) throws RodinDBException
      Delete all internal elements that are in the given structured selection.
      Parameters:
      ssel - structured selection in viewer
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
